productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Men Solid Yellow Tshirts
description: CompositionPastel yellow polo T-shirt, made of 100% cotton, has a ribbed collar with velvet tape detailing on the inseam, short sleeves with ribbed cuffs, rugged buttoned chest placket, brand logo embroidered on the left chest and a vented hemFittingRegularWash careMachine wash in 30 degrees using mild detergentDo not dry clean, tumble dry, wring, scrub or bleachDry flat in shadeWarm ironDo not iron directly on print/embroideryLook cool and sophisticated in this pastel yellow polo neck T-shirt from United Colours of Benetton. The bold embroidered logo  adds an interesting detail to the tee, while the cotton keeps you feeling fresh and comfortable all day. Team this with jeans or chinos and comfortable-yet-stylish lifestyle footwear from the wide collection available at myntra for casual occasions.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-5.11", Shoulders-18.5"
